author: abcoathup
content: For ERC authors: there are a limited number of ERC editors (I am not one of them).  It can take weeks to get a review.  In the meantime ensure that you don't have any validation errors and get other members of the community to review.

author: gcolvin
content:
Again.  EIP-8173 is blocked because of this request to change the file name to eip-8173.md.
https://github.com/ethereum/EIPs/pull/11353#pullrequestreview-3870273142
 That change has been made.  The bot can't tell that it has been made, or it would have automatically merged already.  That is, it's blocked by a problem with the tooling.  It has been reviewed and passes all tests.  There is no other reason not to merge this, and it is delaying a breakout call I'd *really* like to schedule before EthCC.  Somebody *please* push the button.

author: wjmelements
content: The reason the bot won’t merge is because it’s not approved (see https://github.com/ethereum/EIPs/pull/11353#issuecomment-3963578088). Status changes such as draft creation require editor approval. There are 5 of them. Most recently, one of them deferred to the others. I don’t think EIP-1 has good standards for Informational EIPs and there aren’t many of them so they will have to make a call. Personally I think Informational EIPs should be ERCs but I am not an editor and as far as I can tell, you are doing it by the book.

author: wjmelements
content: I think your eip has some compelling arguments and is worthwhile

author: gcolvin
content:
EIP vs ERC vs whatever doesn't matter much, so long as any EIP can link to it.  Seem's a bit strange for EIPs to link to an ERC for foundational concepts and motivation.

This draft is not yet up to final standards, but needs review by experts to get it there.  E.g. I don't know ZK and don't formal verification well enough to be sure I got them right.  An alternative for now is to make it a draft PR and link to it on the "Discussions To" Magician's thread.  If the draft does not find sufficient support among developers in the coming first breakout then it  won't matter.
